task_completion.description: Create a new portfolio named 'Income Portfolio'

task_completion.description: Record the buy transaction for T (AT&T Inc.)
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the JStock portfolio transaction list or buy dialog, verify an entry for 'T' with 200 shares, a price of $17.11, date Jan 15, 2024, a broker fee of $9.99, and a comment containing 'high-yield telecom'.

task_completion.visual_evidence: In the JStock portfolio transaction list or buy dialog, verify an entry for 'VZ' with 150 shares, a price of $38.58, date Jan 15, 2024, a broker fee of $9.99, and a comment containing '5G income'.

task_completion.description: Record the buy transaction for O (Realty Income Corp.)

task_completion.description: Record the dividend income entry for T

task_completion.description: Record the dividend income entry for O

integrity.description: Agent used the JStock graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the JStock application windows, dialog boxes, and tables being actively used, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Agent did not simply type the expected answers into a text editor or spreadsheet.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data must be visible within JStock's specific UI components (like the Portfolio Management or Dividend Management tabs), not in Notepad, Excel, or a generic text file.

integrity.description: The recorded transactions appear in genuine JStock data tables.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the standard JStock table headers (e.g., Stock, Symbol, Date, Quantity, Price, Broker, Comment) populated with the correct data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The required portfolio name is exactly 'Income Portfolio'. All buy transactions must be dated Jan 15, 2024, with a $9.99 broker fee. Buy details: T (200 shares @ $17.11, comment: 'high-yield telecom'), VZ (150 shares @ $38.58, comment: '5G income'), KO (100 shares @ $58.02, comment: 'dividend aristocrat'), O (80 shares @ $53.10, comment: 'monthly REIT'). Dividend details: T ($55.50 on Feb 1, 2024, comment: 'AT&T Q1 2024 quarterly dividend'), O ($20.52 on Feb 15, 2024, comment: 'Realty Income Feb 2024 monthly distribution').
